title: Magnificently Crunchy Moroccan Chickpeas Fritters
description: Sour and crunchy Moroccan chickpeas fritters perfect for a brunch mood, featuring garlic and gluten-free friendly ingredients, deep-fried to a golden brown perfection.

ingredients.name: spices
ingredients.notes: ground cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper

instructions: In a large bowl, mash the chickpeas using a fork or a potato masher until they are mostly smooth.
Add the minced garlic, chopped onion, lemon juice, olive oil, and spices to the bowl and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the chickpea flour and a pinch of salt.
Add the flour mixture to the chickpea mixture and stir until a thick batter forms.
Add the beaten eggs to the batter and mix until the eggs are fully incorporated.
Using your hands, shape the batter into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Heat about 2-3 inches of olive oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully place a few of the patties into the hot oil and fry for about 3-4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
